summary: Created spec file at specs/feat-1238-issue-9-testimonials-carousel-real-photos.md describing the carousel and real photo feature.

Modified src/components/TestimonialCard.astro: added optional `photo` and `photoAlt` props. When `photo` is provided, renders a circular (44x44px, border-radius:50%, object-fit:cover, gold border) instead of the gradient initials avatar. Falls back gracefully to initials when photo is absent.

Modified src/components/Testimonials.astro: replaced static 3-column .testimonials-grid with an interactive single-card carousel. Carousel includes: overflow-hidden wrapper, flexbox track with CSS transform translation, prev/next navigation buttons, dot indicators (gold active dot), touch/swipe support (>=50px threshold), and reduced-motion support (transition disabled when prefers-reduced-motion:reduce).

Created public/testimonials/ directory with placeholder photos (marco-rossi.webp, sarah-kim.webp, james-walsh.webp) sourced from existing gallery images — to be replaced with real client photos when provided.
All carousel logic is vanilla JS (no external libraries), inline <script> in Testimonials.astro.

Accessibility: role=region + aria-label on carousel wrapper, role=group + aria-label on each slide, role=tablist on dots, aria-selected on dot buttons, prev/next buttons have descriptive aria-label translated per locale (es/en/zh), aria-live=polite on the wrapper.
Astro build completed successfully: 7 pages built in 3.34s, 0 errors.
